actNotes.notes:
Clearfell       - Beira         - 10% Cold Res
Hunting Ground  - Crowbell Boss - 2 Passive Points
Freythorn - King In The Mists - 30 Spirit + Lvl4 Spirit Gem
Ogham Farmlands - Una's Lute    - 2 Passive Points
Ogham Manor     - Candlemass    - +20 Life

Ctrl+Alt+S to open settings and drag/scale windows

Do Devourer to have enough skill gems
Gem Order: Volcano > Contagion > Flame Wall > Skele Sniper
> ED > Frost Bomb

Get a Storm Rune to socket into wand for Bonestorm picked up
at Level 14

Sceptre: Spirit/ +minion levels/Allies deal & inc damage

Get a poison charm for Act 3 Viper Napuatzi

Movespeed boots - Max 10% this Act
New Weapon
